title: C# Class Generator
scenario: Generate a C# class that represents a bank account. The class should have properties for `account_number`, `account_name`, `balance`, and `account_type`. The class should implement the `IComparable` interface to compare bank accounts based on their balance. The class should also override the `ToString` method to return a string representation of the account. The class should be under 200 lines of code.
constraints: Must be under 200 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the class adheres to the line limit and implements the IComparable interface.
Verify that the class has correct C# syntax.
Check if the class correctly implements the IComparable interface and overrides the ToString method.
